faqs.question: Why is Node.js popular for backend development?
faqs.answer: Node.js is event-driven, non-blocking, and supports high concurrency. It's ideal for real-time applications, APIs, and scalable backend systems.

faqs.question: Can Node.js handle high-traffic applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Node.js with clustering and load balancing can efficiently handle high-traffic applications with minimal resource usage.

faqs.question: What industries benefit from Node.js development?
faqs.answer: Real-time apps, fintech, e-commerce, SaaS, IoT, and streaming platforms benefit significantly from Node.js backend solutions.

faqs.question: Can Node.js be used for full-stack development?
faqs.answer: Yes, Node.js with React/Vue on the frontend enables full-stack JavaScript development for efficient end-to-end projects.
